Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 5002 0 0}Did you know part of the Kirijo name comes from the character for "paulownia tree"?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 -1 0 0}I looked online, and since this mall belongs to the Kirijo Group, it was actually named after them.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 -1 0 0}I think the Kirijo Group is also the parent organization of our school.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 5075 0 0}There's something I want to ask you...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 -1 0 0}I was talking to the owner of Aohige Pharmacy about cooking...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 4 23 0 6 3 25 25}And he told me to try using dried snake meat as an ingredient... Can you believe that?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 4 23 0 6 0 25 25}Um... If I did make a dish with dried snake meat, would you still eat it, {f 4 1}-kun?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 4 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 5099 0 0}{f 5 13 3 15 6}Huh...? Wait, really? D-Do I have to cook something with a snake?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 4 -1 -1 0 0}But, if you really want me to, then...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 6 -1 -1 0 0}...I'm sorry. I don't think I can do it. The thought of touching a snake, dead or alive, is terrifying.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Fuuka seems to be having fun.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Я дізнався про неї трохи більше сьогодні.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_006_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 1 -1 -1 0 0}I was worried you'd say that you want to try it...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 6 -1 -1 0 0}{f 4 23 0 6 6 25 25}I don't think I could cook snake meat, honestly... I'd be too afraid to touch it.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_007_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Фуука виглядає полегшеною.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Я відчуваю, що ми стали значно ближчими сьогодні.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_008_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 3 -1 -1 0 0}I mean, have you ever seen dried snake meat!?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 3 -1 -1 0 0}It has the texture of a Shadow, and it's the size of a hose on a fire truck...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 3 -1 -1 0 0}There's no way I'm bringing something like that back to the dorm with me! I can't even bear to touch it![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_009_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Fuuka is teary-eyed...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Я відчуваю, що ми не стали ближчими сьогодні...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_010_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 5061 0 0}What's another ingredient that could substitute snake meat? Eel, maybe?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 -1 0 0}But the texture might still feel too similar to a snake. I don't know that I could bring myself to touch that either...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 4 23 0 6 1 25 25}Maybe I could find some options at a fish market. Do you want to come with me, {f 4 1}-kun?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_011_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}We went shopping for ingredients[n]before returning to the dorm.[n]{f 1 1}
